creator: grg@isabase.philol.msu.ru
text:
gvim (graphical VIM for X) doesn't work:
   - the version from ports
	   display a window but filled with the message 'OOPS buffer empty',
		 and doesn't show any other text.
	 - the version compiled from standard vim distribution
	   (without freebsd port patchs) displays
		 an empty window and doesn't react to any keyboard/mouse events.
